characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Iggle Piggle is the main character of the series. He is a blue humanoid-looking teddy bear who speaks in squeaking noises. He sleeps in a boat and has a red blanket that doubles as the boat's sail. Character Tics: He falls down when worried. Diegetic Soundtrack Usage: His song is sung to the tune of the main theme. Genki Boy: He's one of the most active members of the cast. Informed Species: According to the show's official website, Igglepiggle is a teddy bear. He doesn't look like one, though, and instead resembles a humanoid with a bean-shaped head.

characters.name: Iggle Piggle
characters.description: Iggle Piggle is the main character of the series. He is a blue humanoid-looking teddy bear who speaks in squeaking noises. He sleeps in a boat and has a red blanket that doubles as the boat's sail. Character Tics: He falls down when worried. Diegetic Soundtrack Usage: His song is sung to the tune of the main theme. Genki Boy: He's one of the most active members of the cast. Informed Species: According to the show's official website, Igglepiggle is a teddy bear. He doesn't look like one, though, and instead resembles a humanoid with a bean-shaped head.

characters.name: Upsy Daisy
characters.description: Iggle Piggle's best friend, a little ragdoll-type creature. Her interests include flowers and blowing kisses. Pulling the purple cord on her belt will cause her skirt to swell up into a tutu (as shown on her page image), allowing her to dance. Ambiguously Human: She looks like she couldalmostpass off as human. Cartoon Creature: Her species is unknown, but she looksalmosthuman. Character Tics: She often blows kisses, and when she's surprised her hair sticks up. Genki Girl: Downplayed. She's usually pretty active and enthusiastic, but she still takes naps.

characters.name: Makka Pakka
characters.description: A creature who lives in a cave. His main interests include stones, washing things, andwashing stones. Cartoon Creature: His species is unknown. Catchphrase: He often says lyrics in his song, like "Ing ang oo!" or "Agga pang!". Neat Freak: He loves to wash things. Word Salad Lyrics:Makka pakka akka wakka mikka makka mooMakka pakka appa yakka ikka akka ooHum dum agga pang ing ang ooMakka pakka akka wakka mikka makka moo

characters.name: The Tombliboos
characters.description: Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal: They wear nothing but pants. Meaningful Name: Apparently, their names are supposed to be based on how a toddler would sound if they counted to three. This fits as there's three of them. Word Salad Lyrics:Ombliboo tombliboo, knock on the doorOmbliboo tombliboo, sit on the floorOmbliboo tombliboo, here is my noseOmbliboo tombliboo, that's how it goes!

characters.name: The Pontipines
characters.description: A family of ten little people who speak in high-pitched sounds. A Day in the Limelight: Along with the Wottingers, they got their own episode called "Oh Look! It's the Wottingers!". Aside from the narrator, the other characters don't even appear for most of the episode. Gender-Equal Ensemble: Five males and five females, including the mom and dad. Massive Numbered Siblings: There are eight kids in all. No Name Given: The individuals are not named.

characters.name: The Haa-Hoos
characters.description: A group of giant balloon-like characters. No Name Given: The individual Haa-Hoos aren't named.

characters.name: The Tittifers
characters.description: A group of birds who sing at bedtime. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: The Tittifers are live-action birds whose color schemes are changed via CGI to make them much brighter. No Name Given: The individual birds have no names. Phrase Catcher: When they sing, the narrator will say, "The Tittifers have sung their song." Silly Animal Sound: Most of them make noises like musical instruments; only a few make actual bird noises.

characters.name: The Wottingers
characters.description: The Pontipines' neighbours, and another family of ten little people. A Day in the Limelight: Along with the Pontipines, they got their own episode called "Oh Look! It's the Wottingers!". Aside from the narrator, the other characters don't even appear for most of the episode. Gender-Equal Ensemble: Five males and five females, including the mom and dad - just like the Pontipines. No Name Given: Like the Pontipines, they lack individual names. Palette Swap: They look exactly the same as the Pontipines, but with blue clothes instead of red.
